response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals with 15+ years of experience, their career has been focused on web development, backend services, and infrastructure tooling rather than hardware architecture and AI accelerator optimization. The role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and AI workload performance optimization—none of which are evident in their background. Recent work with AI-agent infrastructure appears to be MCP frameworks and developer tooling rather than the hardware-software co-design expertise required.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with demonstrated senior-level expertise across multiple domains
Track record of performance optimization in high-throughput, low-latency systems at scale
Strong learning ability and technical versatility across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or hardware design experience evident in career history
Career trajectory focused on web/backend services rather than hardware optimization or systems-level architecture
Missing expertise in deep neural network training/inference optimization and AI accelerator workload analysis

key_factors.factor: Senior IC-level seniority and learning ability
